### 🍳 Feature: [Name]

#### **Summary**

<!-- 1–3 sentences explaining what the feature does at a high level.
Focus on behavior, not implementation details. -->

---

#### **Scope**

<!-- Clearly define boundaries to avoid scope creep.
“In” = what this issue WILL implement.
“Out” = what is intentionally excluded (future work). -->

---

#### **Implementation Notes**

<!-- Key technical hints for whoever builds this.
List relevant parts of the system:
- API endpoints (if backend)
- DB tables/fields (if data-related)
- UI components/screens (if frontend)
- AI components (vision model, LLM, etc.)

Keep it directional, not a full design doc. -->

---

#### **Acceptance Criteria**

<!-- Checklist that defines “done”.
Should be testable and observable (not vague).
Ex: “Inventory updates after image upload” instead of “Works correctly”. -->

---

#### **Tasks**

<!-- Breaks feature into small, actionable steps (ideally 1–4 hours each).
Think in execution order. This is what someone will actually do. -->
